title: Assorted Colors Freezer Blocks (Pack of 3) - Grey, Cream, Pink Blocks, Ideal for Holidays, Trips & Summer Events
features: VIBRANT ASSORTED COLORS: Our freezer blocks come in stylish grey, cream, and pink colors, adding a pop of brightness and fun to your cooler, and making it perfect for holidays, trips, and summer events.

DURABLE AND SAFE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, these freezer blocks ensure long-lasting use and safety for your food and beverages, so you can enjoy your time outdoors without any worry.

EASY TO USE AND REUSABLE: Simply pop the assorted colors freezer blocks in the freezer before your event, and they're ready to use! They're both convenient and reusable, making them an eco-friendly and cost-effective option.

COMPACT AND VERSATILE: The freezer blocks are small and lightweight, making them a perfect fit for various cooler sizes and types. Use them for family outings, sports events, or even as a reliable cooling solution during power outages.

LONG-LASTING COLD TEMPERATURE: These freezer blocks are designed to retain their coldness, ensuring your food stays fresh and chilled for hours, making them an excellent solution for picnics, BBQs, and beach outings.
description: Introducing our assorted colors freezer blocks coming to you in stylish shades of grey, cream, and pink! These compact, effective freezer blocks are just what you need to keep your food and drinks cool during holidays, trips, or summer events. Simply pop them in the freezer ahead of time, and they're ready to maintain the right temperature for your goodies on the go. Whether you're planning a picnic, a road trip, or a beach day, our freezer blocks are a must-have for your adventures.
